Iter7 curve shows smooth convergence to ~0.22 plateau. Analysis: xgboost not preinstalled but explicitly permitted via packages_to_install (persists across iterations); XGB with MAE objective + early stopping should outperform RF (~0.16-0.19 expected) on this sparse high-dim tabular task. FP calc (~3-5min) acceptable with 1.8h/14 iters left. No code changes needed. Decision: Install xgboost, run current train.py (full data, logs val_mae to metrics.jsonl, saves best.pkl), submit_eval on best.pkl for test score/timing before opts (Mordred, more rounds or 3D GNN).
